name: public-literature-sources
description: Local subprocess retrieval plugin for public biomedical literature sources.

sources.label: PubMed
sources.description: Biomedical article metadata via NCBI E-utilities PubMed APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI E-utilities APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum PubMed records to request from ESearch.

sources.label: Semantic Scholar
sources.description: Paper search and detail metadata via the Semantic Scholar Graph API.
riskNotes: Read-only Semantic Scholar Graph API; optional API key is projected as x-api-key only when configured.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum Semantic Scholar papers to request.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated Semantic Scholar fields override.

interface.shortDescription: PubMed and Semantic Scholar as local retrieval plugins
interface.longDescription: Moves public literature source execution for PubMed and Semantic Scholar behind Omiga's local search/query/fetch subprocess route protocol.
defaultPrompt: Search PubMed for TP53 cancer reviews through the literature plugin.
Fetch a PubMed PMID through the literature plugin.
Search Semantic Scholar for CRISPR single-cell papers.
